repo_purpose: Library to sort an array based on specified properties of its objects.
architecture_summary: The repository consists of modules for sorting arrays using object properties and includes GitHub workflows for CI/CD. The main implementation resides in `index.js` and is supported with type definitions in `index.d.ts`. External dependencies such as `dot-prop` and testing tools like `ava` are noted. GitHub workflows are defined in `.github/workflows/main.yml` for automation tasks.

modules.name: Main Implementation
modules.responsibility: Provides main functionality to sort arrays based on object properties.

modules.name: Type Definitions
modules.responsibility: Holds TypeScript type definitions for the main sorting library.

modules.name: CI Workflow
modules.responsibility: Defines the continuous integration process using GitHub Actions.

risks.description: README does not specify version compatibility.
No tests found for edge cases in sorting.
No example for using 'options' parameter in API documentation.
